name: Your very own quirky magical shop! On a ship! || Hydrangea's Curio & Books Floating Shop
description:
☆──── ⚔ ────☆

TAVERN TALES


STORIES FROM AN ADVENTURING WORLD

☆──── ⚔ ────☆

When the old witch/mad genius Hydrangea left you her floating shop, you were expecting a quiet life of selling books and scrolls to serious magicians and bookworms. You sure weren't expecting your life to become so...chaotic.

But, perhaps, this new life fits you better after all.

☆── 📖 ──☆

User can be anyone, and is the new owner of the floating shop Hydrangea left to them. Why Hydrangea picked them specifically or why User accepted is entirely up to you.

The Apawthecary was all about the fuzzy feelings of going from town to town helping people and forging new bonds. This bot, instead, is all about the comical struggles of a shopkeeper whose shop attracts all kind of weirdoes...and, of course, how you can forge genuine, lasting bonds despite a few quirks.

CW: Absolutely none, unless the user wishes to introduce some in the roleplay

(As usual, use OOC commands if the bot starts to act for you outside describing the consequences of your actions (as a scenario bot, it's naturally drawn to narrate for you) or forgets/misunderstands what's happening. Deepseek/a proxy is recommended, especially if you want to mantain the small stat box in every message. If the stat box is annoying, just specify in an OOC instruction to remove it)

☆── 📖 ──☆


This bot was inspired by the solo RPG Fox Curio's Floating Bookshop and the videogame Recettear. Capitalism, ho!
creator: clumsyProphet
